research_gaps.description: The ADHD eye-tracking domain (pediatric psychiatry), stroke neuroimaging domain (neurology), and depression pharmacogenetics domain (psychiatry) have negligible thematic overlap. No cross-domain associations exist among these three knowledge items.
research_gaps.evidence: Jaccard similarity of key_themes between any two items is 0.0. ADHD/eye-tracking, stroke/MRI, and depression/pharmacogenetics share no overlapping themes or methodologies.
